_comment: Branch protection for PRODUCT-CODE tier per REPO_STANDARDS.md §2. Tier repos: iplan-runner, aidoc-flow-engramory, aidoc-flow-ci. Required approving reviews: 0 (substantive review = ai-review.yml + composition.yml; auto-merge armed by auto-merge-ai-prs.yml). CODEOWNERS review deferred to v2. Includes `Secret scan (gitleaks)` because public/private both benefit.
_apply_note: PR-C2 MUST strip ALL `_`-prefix keys before POST/PUT/PATCH. Use `jq 'del(.._comment, .._apply_note, .._docs, .._endpoint, .._umbrella_note)'` or equivalent. GitHub REST endpoints strictly validate unknown fields.
